summary: Code review verification for Calibration Psych page fixes. All 6 features/bugs verified through code review. Auth-gated page cannot be functionally tested without Supabase login, but structural code changes are correctly implemented.

container_height_fix.change: Changed from min-h-screen to 'h-screen flex flex-col overflow-hidden'
container_height_fix.details: Container now constrained to viewport height, prevents page growing beyond viewport

auto_scroll_messages.change: Added useEffect to scroll to bottom on messages/isSubmitting change
auto_scroll_messages.details: scrollRef.current.scrollTop = scrollRef.current.scrollHeight triggers on [messages, isSubmitting] deps

input_auto_focus.change: Added useEffect to focus input after sending

chat_layout_fixed_form.change: Chat mode layout with flex-1 overflow-y-auto messages area and fixed form at bottom
chat_layout_fixed_form.details: Messages div has flex-1 overflow-y-auto, form is below with borderTop styling

auto_followup_handleChatSubmit.change: Auto-requests next step when AI response has no question mark
auto_followup_handleChatSubmit.details: Checks hasQuestion = data.message.includes('?'), if false calls callEdge with next step

auto_followup_applyResponse.change: Auto-fetches next step when message has no question mark
auto_followup_applyResponse.details: Checks !data.message.includes('?'), if true auto-calls callEdge with next step

critical_code_review_comments: All fixes are correctly implemented per the requirements
The h-screen overflow-hidden on container will constrain viewport and prevent scroll issues
Auto-scroll useEffect correctly depends on [messages, isSubmitting]
Auto-follow-up logic in both handleChatSubmit and applyResponse correctly detects statements without questions by checking includes('?')

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All code changes verified via code review

test_credentials.note: Supabase auth - login did not complete in preview environment

context_for_next_testing_agent: Calibration Psych page uses Supabase auth which did not work in preview. Code review confirms all fixes are implemented: 1) Container h-screen overflow-hidden prevents scroll issues, 2) Auto-scroll useEffect added, 3) Input auto-focus useEffect added, 4) Auto-follow-up logic in handleChatSubmit and applyResponse when AI gives acknowledgments without questions. Functional testing requires authenticated session via Supabase.
auth_note: App uses Supabase auth (not local auth). Login with test credentials did not complete - stayed on login page. Page redirects to login-supabase when not authenticated, preventing functional UI testing of calibration flows.
